name: Middle East
culture_notes: Typography & Layout: Mandatory RTL (Right-to-Left) mirroring. Use 'Diwani' or 'Kufi' calligraphy for headers. Gold/Emerald/Royal Blue palette is the 'Standard of Wealth'.
Tribal Identity: Replace 'Clan' with 'Alliance/Kingdom/Family' terminologies. Emphasize the leader's role as a 'Protector' and 'Provider'.
Visual Taboos: Strict modesty. No religious symbols (crosses), no alcohol/pork references. Female characters should wear elegant, powerful, yet modest attire (Armor > Skin).
Digital Majlis: The game is a social hub. Highlight Chat UI, World-wide announcements, and 'Gifting' systems in the materials.
Status Symbols: Show off 'VIP Levels', 'Exclusive Frames', and 'Server-wide broadcast' effects when a whale enters or achieves something.
creative_hooks: The 'Majestic Entrance': A high-level player entering a chat or battlefield, causing all other players to bow or react (Visualizing social dominance).
The 'Generosity' Hook: A whale distributing 'Red Packets' or resources to their alliance. In ME culture, giving is as much a flex as spending.
The 'Call to Honor': Use slogans like 'For the Glory of the Kingdom' or 'Defend your Brothers'. Focus on collective victory over individual gain.
The 'Total Customization': Showcasing gold-plated skins, luxury palace interiors, or personalized emblems that scream 'Exclusivity'.

tone_and_manner.voiceover: Deep, resonant male baritone with a formal Arabic (MSA) or high-end Khaliji accent. Tone must be Epic and Respectful.
tone_and_manner.pacing: Grand and deliberate. Avoid 'frantic' cuts; use sweeping camera movements to show scale and opulence.

preferred_bgm: Cinematic fusion: Traditional Oud/Ney instruments mixed with high-end orchestral percussion (Hans Zimmer style).
focus: Honor & Reputation (Social) > Power & Domination (PVP) > Wealth Display (Spend)
